title: Village and Pillage
description: Villager guards, ships, outposts and much much more!
body:
a Modpack that reworks some villager and pillager systems and is a nice addition to play with!


<details>
<summary>Includes:</summary>

- Fresh Animations
- Torturable Healthbars
- Guard Villagers
- Illager Raid Music
- Illager Revolution
- Illager Trader
- You Thief!
- You Bandit!
- Villager Names
- Towns and Towers

</details>
